steps.title: Test the first inequality
steps.content:
Substitute $(3,-5)$ into inequality I.
$$
-5<-3(3)+7
$$
$$
-5<-2
$$
This statement is true, so point $P$ satisfies inequality I.

steps.title: Test the second inequality
steps.content:
Substitute $(3,-5)$ into inequality II.
$$
-5>3-5
$$
$$
-5>-2
$$
This statement is false, so point $P$ does not satisfy inequality II.

steps.title: Choose the true statement
steps.content: The point satisfies inequality I only. The answer is A.
